valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Sun 26 Apr 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Mon 27 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: High Humber 1027 expected German Bight 1027 by 0600 Monday. New high expected Shannon 1028 by same time

Wind
In west, southeasterly 3 or 4, occasionally 5 later. In east, variable 2 to 4, but northwesterly 4 to 6 until later.
Sea state
In west, moderate, occasionally rough at first. in east, slight or moderate, occasionally rough at first.
Weather
In west, occasional rain. In east, mainly fair.
Visibility
In west, good, occasionally moderate. In east, good, occasionally moderate later.
